body:
Extend the existing NamedFieldTuple alias (NamedTuple of Fields) with vector-space operations:

- `Base.similar(::NamedFieldTuple)`
- `set!(::NamedFieldTuple, ::Number)`
- `set!(dst::NamedFieldTuple, src::NamedFieldTuple)`
- `LinearAlgebra.norm(::NamedFieldTuple)` returns the block 2-norm.
- `LinearAlgebra.dot(::NamedFieldTuple, ::NamedFieldTuple)` sums per-field dots.
title: Extend `Field` methods to `NamedFieldTuple`
